exercises.name: Back Squat
cues: Brace the core before unracking and before each descent.
Controlled descent (~2s), knees tracking over toes.
Drive through the midfoot, hips and chest rise together.
heartSafe: Stop at RIR 1-2. No max singles, no grinding reps.
Exhale through the sticking point on the way up. Do not hold the breath through a full rep (Valsalva spikes BP).

exercises.name: Front Squat
cues: Elbows high, bar resting on front delts, not the hands.
Upright torso, controlled descent.
Drive up keeping elbows lifted.
heartSafe: Stop at RIR 1-2.
Short, controlled exhale on the drive up. Avoid prolonged breath-hold.

exercises.name: Leg Press
cues: Feet shoulder-width on the platform.
Lower under control until knees ~90 degrees, no lumbar rounding.
Do not lock knees hard at the top.
heartSafe: Stop at RIR 1-2.
Steady breathing. This is a good machine option for precise, controlled load.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
cues: Soft knees, hips travel back, bar stays close to the legs.
Lower until a hamstring stretch, neutral spine throughout.
Drive hips forward to stand, squeeze glutes at the top.
heartSafe: Keep it in the 6-10 range. No heavy low-rep pulls.
Exhale on the way up. No breath-holding through the rep.

exercises.name: Trap-Bar Deadlift
cues: Stand inside the bar, grip the handles, chest up.
Push the floor away, hips and shoulders rise together.
More upright torso than a conventional pull — easier on the spine.
heartSafe: Keep reps 6-8, RIR 2. No max attempts.
Brief exhale on the lift. Preferred over conventional deadlift for controlled, lower-spike loading.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
cues: Upper back on the bench, bar over the hips (use a pad).
Drive hips up, full glute squeeze, ribs down.
Lower under control.
heartSafe: Stop at RIR 1-2.
Exhale at the top of the drive. No breath-holding.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
cues: Shoulder blades retracted and down, slight arch.
Bar to lower chest, elbows ~45 degrees from torso.
Press up and slightly back toward the rack.
heartSafe: Use a spotter or stay 2 reps from failure. No grinding.
Exhale on the press. Do not hold the breath through the full rep.

exercises.name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
cues: Bench at ~30 degrees, shoulder blades set.
Bar to upper chest, controlled descent.
Press without flaring elbows excessively.
heartSafe: Stay at RIR 1-2.
Exhale on the press.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
cues: Bench ~30 degrees, dumbbells over upper chest.
Lower under control to a stretch, elbows ~45 degrees.
Press up and slightly together.
heartSafe: Stop at RIR 1-2.
Exhale on the press.

exercises.name: Overhead Press (Standing or Seated)
cues: Bar on front delts, elbows slightly in front.
Brace, press overhead, push the head 'through' at lockout.
Seated variation reduces low-back load if needed.
heartSafe: Overhead pressing raises BP more than most lifts. Keep it 6-8 reps, RIR 2, never to failure.
Controlled exhale on the press. No sustained breath-hold.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
cues: Slight lean back, chest up.
Pull the bar to the upper chest, drive elbows down.
Control the eccentric, full stretch at the top.
heartSafe: Steady tempo, RIR 1-2.
Normal breathing throughout.

exercises.name: Pull-Up
cues: Full hang start, shoulders engaged.
Pull chest toward the bar, drive elbows down.
Control the descent to a full hang.
heartSafe: Stop at RIR 1-2. Use assisted version to stay out of grinding territory.
Exhale on the pull.

exercises.name: Assisted Pull-Up
cues: Set assistance so the last rep is RIR 1-2.
Full range: dead hang to chest near bar.
Controlled descent.
heartSafe: Reduce assistance over time as a secondary progression.
Normal breathing.

exercises.name: Barbell Row (Chest-Supported preferred)
cues: Hinge with a neutral spine, or use a chest-supported bench to remove low-back load.
Row to the lower ribs, squeeze the shoulder blades.
Control the descent.
heartSafe: Chest-supported variation preferred — removes the isometric low-back load and the breath-hold tendency.
Exhale on the row. RIR 1-2.

exercises.name: Chest-Supported Row
cues: Chest against the pad, full arm extension to start.
Row, driving elbows back, squeeze the upper back.
Control the return.
heartSafe: Steady tempo, RIR 1-2.
Normal breathing — no spinal loading to manage.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
cues: Tall torso, slight backward lean only.
Pull to the navel, elbows close, squeeze.
Control the stretch forward.
heartSafe: Steady tempo, RIR 1-2.
Normal breathing.

exercises.name: Seated/Lying Leg Curl
cues: Pad just above the heels.
Curl fully, control the eccentric.
No hip lifting to cheat the rep.
heartSafe: Light accessory. Steady breathing, RIR 1.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
cues: Slight elbow bend, lead with the elbows.
Raise to shoulder height, no shrugging.
Control the descent.
heartSafe: Light, high-rep accessory. Normal breathing.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
cues: Rope at face height, pull toward the forehead.
Elbows high, externally rotate at the end.
Control the return.
heartSafe: Light accessory, good for shoulder health. Normal breathing.

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
cues: Kneel, rope behind the head.
Crunch by flexing the spine, hips stay fixed.
Control back to the start.
heartSafe: Exhale on the crunch. No breath-holding.

exercises.name: Hanging Knee Raise
cues: Dead hang, no swinging.
Raise knees toward the chest, posterior pelvic tilt.
Lower under control.
heartSafe: Controlled tempo, exhale on the raise.

exercises.name: Pallof Press
cues: Stand side-on to a cable, press the handle straight out.
Resist rotation, ribs down.
Hold briefly, return.
heartSafe: Anti-rotation core work. Breathe steadily, do not hold the breath during the hold.

exercises.name: Plank
cues: Forearms under shoulders, straight line head to heels.
Brace, glutes tight, ribs down.
Hold for time.
heartSafe: Breathe steadily throughout the hold. Never hold the breath.
